text:
Once upon a time, in a forest far, far away, there was a curious squirrel named Sparkle. Sparkle loved exploring the woods, finding nuts, and chasing amusing things. One sunny afternoon, after collecting an impressive stash of walnuts, Sparkle had an idea. She collected some shiny stones and began fashioning tiny necklaces.

Every day after her sunbathe, Sparkle would dash through the leaves, weaving her treasures around her neck. Her friends admired her ornaments. The owl chuckled at her necklaces. The possum poked fun. Then, one day, a bird swooped down with a shiny stone.

Sparkle chattered happily, "Hey! Why are you taking my necklaces?"

The bird replied with a soft chuckle, "I think you find them beautiful, silly squirrel!"

So, she shared them. And the forest became enchanted. It dawned on them, little mammals included, that beauty went far beyond stones. It was in their kindness,
